summary: Tested POS refund flow features. 10/10 backend tests passed. Fixed bug in /api/reports/credit endpoint that was returning refunded orders. All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /api/reports/credit endpoint in reports_routes.py was missing status filter - added $nin: ['cancelled', 'refunded'] to exclude refunded orders
VERIFIED: GET /api/cash-register/summary includes total_refunds and refund_count fields
VERIFIED: POST /api/cash-register/close includes total_refunds and refund_count in response
VERIFIED: Refunded orders excluded from cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales in cash-register/summary
VERIFIED: Credit report endpoint now excludes refunded orders from credit order list
VERIFIED: POS.js payment for editingOrder skips kitchen print (line 2029: if (!editingOrder))
VERIFIED: POS.js refund prints items with [مرتجع] prefix to kitchen
VERIFIED: POS.js cancel prints items with [تم حذف] prefix to kitchen
VERIFIED: Reports.js uses 'المرتجعات' label (11 occurrences found)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created for refund flow testing (TEST_CREDIT_REFUND_154, TEST_CASH_REFUND_154, TEST_NIN_FILTER_154)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features verified: 1) Create credit order then refund - credit_sales drops to 0 in summary. 2) After refund, total_refunds shows refunded amount. 3) Cash register summary includes total_refunds and refund_count. 4) Refunded orders excluded from all sales types. 5) Credit report excludes refunded orders (BUG FIXED in reports_routes.py). 6) POS payment for editingOrder skips kitchen print. 7) Reports page uses 'المرتجعات'. 8) Kitchen prints [مرتجع] for refunds and [تم حذف] for cancels. USB printer is MOCKED (localhost:9999).

verified_features.feature: Create credit order then refund - credit_sales drops to 0 in summary
After refund, total_refunds shows the refunded amount in summary
Cash register summary includes total_refunds and refund_count fields
Refunded orders excluded from cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales
Credit report endpoint excludes refunded orders from credit order list
POS order payment for existing order skips kitchen print

bug_fixed.issue: Credit report endpoint was missing status filter to exclude refunded/cancelled orders
